hypotheses_critiques.title: KDM6B→EP300 Sequential Epigenetic Relay
hypotheses_critiques.critical_issue: False premise: mechanoenhancers are ATAC-accessible on soft ECM, contradicting H3K27me3 Polycomb-silenced assumption. Bivalent enhancers are rare in differentiated fibroblasts.
alternative_explanations: Mechanoenhancers may be H3K4me1-primed (not H3K27me3-repressed) on soft ECM; stiff ECM activates via YAP→EP300 without KDM6B requirement

key_attacks.finding: Mechanoenhancers are ATAC-accessible on soft ECM (Cosgrove 2025), inconsistent with Polycomb-repressed (inaccessible) state
KDM6B evidence (Tayler 2026) is in MSCs undergoing osteogenesis, not lung fibroblasts (Cosgrove 2025 model system)
KDM6B recruitment mechanism to specific enhancer loci not specified; primarily documented at promoters/gene bodies

hypotheses_critiques.conditional_criteria: Verify H3K27me3 presence at mechanoenhancers in lung fibroblasts on soft ECM (CUT&RUN prerequisite). If confirmed, KDM6B relay applies to the bivalent subset.
hypotheses_critiques.required_reframing: Reformulate as conditional: 'IF mechanoenhancers carry H3K27me3 bivalency in fibroblasts on soft ECM, THEN the KDM6B→EP300 relay converts them to active state on stiff ECM.'
hypotheses_critiques.strongest_prediction: KDM6B knockdown on stiff ECM blocks H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers despite accessible chromatin — creating accessible but transcriptionally inert state

hypotheses_critiques.title: Piezo1→CaMKII→EP300 Rapid Pre-Priming
hypotheses_critiques.critical_issue: CaMKII→EP300 direct phosphorylation is not established. Canonical CaMKII target is HDAC4/5 nuclear export, not direct EP300 activation. STRING 0.908 likely reflects indirect co-occurrence.
alternative_explanations: Integrin→FAK→p300 pathway (FAK phosphorylates p300 in mechanobiology)
RhoA→ROCK→nuclear actin→MRTF nuclear (potentially faster than Piezo1 route)

key_attacks.finding: CaMKII→EP300 direct phosphorylation not canonical. Established CaMKII nuclear targets are class IIa HDACs (HDAC4/5). Route should be CaMKII→HDAC4/5 export→EP300 de-repressed binding.
Piezo1 static stiffness activation CONFIRMED by web search (prostate cancer, fibroblast papers). Counter-evidence was overstated — Piezo1 does activate on static hydrogels.
GsMTx4 cannot discriminate Piezo1 from other stretch-activated channels; genetic (Piezo1 KO) preferred

hypotheses_critiques.conditional_criteria: Revise mechanistic route: Piezo1→Ca²⁺→CaMKII→HDAC4/5 nuclear export→EP300 recruitment→H3K27ac. Kinetic predictions remain valid under revised route (HDAC4/5 export: ~5-15 min post-Ca²⁺).
hypotheses_critiques.required_reframing: Replace 'CaMKII directly phosphorylates EP300' with 'CaMKII-mediated HDAC4/5 nuclear export enables EP300 recruitment at mechanoenhancers'
hypotheses_critiques.strongest_prediction: Kinetic separation: H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers at 15 min (Piezo1-dependent, YAP-independent) vs YAP nuclear entry at 30-60 min

hypotheses_critiques.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Size Supralinear Encoding
hypotheses_critiques.critical_issue: Sigmoidal stiffness-transcription curve could reflect YAP nuclear import saturation (Michaelis-Menten transport) rather than LLPS cooperativity. JQ1 does not specifically test condensate cooperativity.
alternative_explanations: YAP nuclear import saturation: sigmoidal response from transport saturation without condensate cooperativity
BRD4 occupancy threshold: transcription requires a minimum number of BRD4 molecules, creating threshold behavior independent of LLPS

key_attacks.finding: YAP nuclear import saturation predicts identical sigmoidal curve without requiring LLPS cooperativity
256x condensate size increase upper bound would be visible by conventional confocal; has not been reported in mechano literature
YAP condensates demonstrated in cancer cells on rigid plastic; not verified in fibroblasts on physiological-stiffness hydrogels

hypotheses_critiques.conditional_criteria: (1) Verify BRD4/YAP condensates form at mechanoenhancers in fibroblasts on stiff hydrogels. (2) Add IDR-deleted YAP mutant as condensate-cooperativity discriminant (superior to JQ1).
hypotheses_critiques.required_reframing: Add prerequisite: YAP condensate detection in fibroblast/hydrogel system. Add IDR-deleted YAP control as key experimental discriminant.
hypotheses_critiques.strongest_prediction: Power law fit (n>1.5) to stiffness-transcription data significantly better than linear model; IDR-deleted YAP linearizes this curve
hypotheses_critiques.updated_evidence: 2025 literature confirms BRD4 LLPS at super-enhancers in multiple cancer contexts (Matsumoto 2024); TAZ condensates contain BRD4/MED1/CDK9 (2025). BRD4 condensate debate less active than originally flagged.

hypotheses_critiques.title: MRTF-A Preferential Mechanoenhancer Occupancy
hypotheses_critiques.critical_issue: Enhancer-over-promoter preference claim has no mechanistic basis. ECM stiffness changes nuclear MRTF-A amount, not its selectivity for enhancers vs promoters. Core occupation test (MRTF-A at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers) is valid.
alternative_explanations: MRTF-A occupies same loci regardless of stiffness; only nuclear concentration changes (quantitative not qualitative)
EP300 recruited at MRTF-A sites via SRF complex, not MRTF-A independently

key_attacks.finding: No mechanism by which nuclear actin concentration changes MRTF-A's binding selectivity for enhancers vs promoters. Established MRTF-A ChIP-seq shows primarily promoter binding (serum-response literature).
MRTF-A→EP300 interaction (STRING 0.710) may be via SRF complex, not independent MRTF-A→EP300 recruitment. Both routes produce same prediction (H3K27ac at CaRG mechanoenhancers).

hypotheses_critiques.conditional_criteria: Remove 'preferentially occupies enhancers over promoters' claim. Replace with: 'MRTF-A occupies CaRG-box mechanoenhancers on stiff ECM; MRTF-A nuclear depletion reduces H3K27ac at CaRG-box (not TEAD-motif) mechanoenhancers.'
hypotheses_critiques.required_reframing: Core testable claim: MRTF-A binds at least a subset of CaRG-box mechanoenhancers on stiff ECM. Drop preference (enhancer > promoter) claim as unwarranted.
hypotheses_critiques.strongest_prediction: MRTF-A siRNA reduces H3K27ac specifically at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers but not TEAD-motif mechanoenhancers on stiff ECM

hypotheses_critiques.title: YAP Condensates Mediate Looping-Independent E-P Contacts
hypotheses_critiques.critical_issue: Verteporfin mechanism mischaracterized (induces 14-3-3σ/YAP cytoplasmic sequestration, not condensate dissolution). 5 competing alternatives for looping-independent mechanism. Condensate formation in fibroblast/hydrogel context unverified.
alternative_explanations: Transcription factory clustering (RNA Pol II) co-activates enhancers without stable loops
eRNA-mediated Mediator bridges without cohesin loops
Condensates as loop extrusion barriers (PMC 2025: 'Liquid condensates: a new barrier to loop extrusion?')

key_attacks.finding: Verteporfin induces 14-3-3σ mediated YAP cytoplasmic sequestration and proteasomal degradation — not condensate dissolution. Prediction using verteporfin cannot attribute effect to condensate surface tension specifically.
86.2% looping-independent may reflect Micro-C technical under-detection (dynamic transient contacts below loop-detection threshold), not a true looping-independent mechanism
5 competing non-condensate mechanisms predict same spatial co-localization result
YAP condensates demonstrated in cancer cells on plastic; formation in fibroblasts on hydrogels not established

hypotheses_critiques.conditional_criteria: (1) Replace verteporfin with IDR-deleted YAP mutant (same nuclear localization, condensate-incompetent). (2) Add RNA Pol II clustering control. (3) Verify YAP forms condensates in fibroblast/hydrogel system as prerequisite.
hypotheses_critiques.required_reframing: Primary prediction: IDR-deleted YAP (condensate-incompetent, nuclear-localized) fails to produce multi-enhancer spatial co-localization despite same nuclear concentration as wild-type YAP on stiff ECM.
hypotheses_critiques.strongest_prediction: Non-looped mechanoenhancer pairs show <300 nm spatial proximity on stiff ECM (absent on soft ECM) that is abolished by IDR-deleted YAP but not by cohesin depletion (WAPL/RAD21 knockdown)
hypotheses_critiques.updated_evidence: 2025 PMC paper: 'Liquid condensates: a new barrier to loop extrusion?' — condensates may block cohesin-mediated extrusion, providing alternative mechanism for loop-deficient E-P contacts

meta_critique.systemic_strength: EP300 hub robust across all hypotheses; looping-independent anomaly is real and important
meta_critique.systemic_weakness: Cell-type context mismatch (3/5 hypotheses use non-fibroblast evidence); mechanoenhancer histone mark state unverified as prerequisite for all hypotheses
meta_critique.inhibitor_flaw_pattern: H2 (GsMTx4 non-specific) and H5 (verteporfin mechanism wrong) both need genetic rather than pharmacological controls

critic_questions.question: Is there published evidence for direct CaMKII phosphorylation of EP300 (not via HDAC4/5 intermediate)? STRING 0.908 may reflect indirect co-occurrence.
critic_questions.impact: If no direct phosphorylation: revise H2 mechanism to CaMKII→HDAC4/5 export→EP300 recruitment

critic_questions.question: Do bivalent enhancers (H3K4me1+H3K27me3) exist in differentiated lung fibroblasts? Or is H3K27me3 at mechanoenhancers implausible in this cell type?
critic_questions.impact: If no bivalency in fibroblasts: H1 restricted to stem/progenitor contexts; would need cell-type caveat

critic_questions.question: Is there any evidence that YAP or YAP-BRD4 condensates form in non-cancerous fibroblasts on physiological-stiffness substrates (1-50 kPa)?
critic_questions.impact: If no fibroblast condensates: H3 and H5 both need cell-type empirical prerequisite validation

critic_questions.question: The proposed verteporfin test conflates YAP nuclear depletion with condensate dissolution. What is the preferred condensate-specific control?
critic_questions.impact: Replace with IDR-deleted YAP mutant (condensate-incompetent, nuclear-localized); this cleanly tests condensate requirement

critic_questions.question: What are the H3K27ac and H3K27me3 marks at Cosgrove 2025 mechanoenhancers specifically? No histone mark ChIP-seq exists at these loci — this is the primary gap underlying all 5 hypotheses.
critic_questions.impact: A single H3K27ac + H3K27me3 + H3K4me1 CUT&RUN experiment in fibroblasts on soft vs stiff ECM would provide the empirical foundation for all 5 hypotheses simultaneously
